extension.summary: Genesis - Cloud, Local Media, Free Links, Anime, Debrid, Plex & Emby
extension.description:
Genesis v1.5.0 - Cloud Browser, Local Scanner, Plex & Emby Integration!
NEW in v1.5.0 - PLEX & EMBY SERVERS: - Plex Media Server Integration - Browse your Plex libraries (Movies, TV Shows) - On Deck (Continue Watching) - Recently Added content - Search Plex library - Direct playback from Plex server - Emby Media Server Integration - Browse your Emby libraries - Continue Watching / Next Up - Recently Added content - Search Emby library - Direct playback from Emby server - TMDb Artwork for Local Media - Automatically fetches posters/fanart for local files - Uses TMDb API for accurate artwork matching - Menu categories only visible when server is enabled - New themed icons for Plex and Emby
Previous Features v1.4.0 - CLOUD & LOCAL MEDIA: - Cloud Browser section (appears when debrid configured) - View Downloaded files from all debrid services - Monitor Currently Downloading items - Browse Cached/History items - Supports: Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize, TorBox - Local Media Scanner - Scan configured folders for movies and TV shows - Auto-detects movie titles, years, quality - Groups TV shows by series and season - Configure folders in Tools menu - Free Links Integration - Scrapes thechains24.com for free streaming links - Integrated into Source Picker (★ symbol) - Uses ResolveURL for link resolution - Filter by "Free Links Only" in source picker
Previous features: - Complete Anime Movies section with submenus - Complete Anime TV Shows section - Networks & Studios browser - Manga section - 7 Anime Torrent Sites - Enhanced X-Ray with Multi-Source Ratings - Full Cast & Crew info with profile images - Enhanced Source Picker with filters - Click-and-Play via 5 Debrid services - Scrapes 10+ torrent sites for sources - TMDB + OMDB metadata integration - Trakt scrobbling and lists support - Live Channels with EPG
Created by zeus768.
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host any content.
extension.news:
v1.5.0 (2026) - NEW: Plex Media Server Integration - Browse libraries, On Deck, Recently Added - Search and direct playback - NEW: Emby Media Server Integration - Browse libraries, Continue Watching, Next Up - Search and direct playback - NEW: TMDb Artwork for Local Media - Auto-fetches posters/fanart for local files - Menu categories only visible when enabled - New Plex and Emby icons for all themes
v1.4.0 (2026) - NEW: Cloud Browser for debrid services - NEW: Local Media Scanner - NEW: Free Links Integration
v1.3.1 (2026) - Renamed to Genesis - Added script.genesis.skins as dependency - Updated icon and fanart
v1.3.0 (2026) - NEW: Full Anime & Manga Category - NEW: 7 Anime Torrent Sites - NEW: Jikan API integration
v1.2.0 (2026) - Enhanced X-Ray with Multi-Source Ratings - Enhanced Source Picker with filters
v1.1.0 (2026) - Live Channels Section with EPG - Latest Releases (In Cinemas Now) - X-Ray Metadata
v1.0.0 (2026) - Initial release
